stories.title: Tiger Woods Arrested on DUI Suspicion — BAC Zero, Medication Suspected

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Tiger Woods arrested on DUI suspicion in Jupiter Island, FL.

His BAC? 0.00. Zero alcohol.

Refused urine test — medication impairment suspected.

Released after 8 hours in jail.

Masters is in 2 weeks. Trump: "He won't be playing."

#GolfFanrecap #TigerWoods #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Tiger played TGL 48 hours before his arrest.

Viewership hit 1M. Showed he could still compete.

Then: rollover crash, 0.00 BAC, refusal charge.

4th car crash since 2009. 2nd DUI in 9 years.

Worst timing in golf. 😔

#GolfFanrecap #TigerWoods

article.headline: Tiger Woods Arrested on DUI Suspicion — BAC 0.00, Medication Suspected

stories.title: Gary Woodland Leads Houston Open Into Sunday — Seeking First Win Since 2019 U.S. Open

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Gary Woodland leads Houston Open at 18-under. ⛳

Last win: 2019 U.S. Open — nearly 7 years ago.

Since then: brain tumor surgery, PTSD diagnosis.

1 shot clear of Højgaard. Final round now.

Comeback story of the year. 🏆

#GolfFanrecap #HoustonOpen #PGATour

article.headline: Woodland Leads Houston Open Into Sunday: Seeking First Win Since 2019 U.S. Open

stories.title: Masters 2026 Preview — Two Weeks Away, McIlroy Defending, Scheffler Chasing Grand Slam

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Masters is 2 weeks away. 🌿

Scheffler +480 (Grand Slam bid)
McIlroy +1000 (defending, back injury)
Rahm +1200 (hot on LIV)
DeChambeau +1200 (back-to-back wins)

And Tiger? Arrested 2 days ago. Trump says he won't play.

#GolfFanrecap #TheMasters #Augusta

article.headline: Masters 2026 Preview: Scheffler's Grand Slam, McIlroy Defending, Tiger's Fate Unknown

stories.title: DeChambeau Dominates LIV Golf — Back-to-Back Wins, 5th Career Title

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
DeChambeau in March: 🏆🏆

✅ LIV Singapore (playoff win)
✅ LIV South Africa (playoff win vs. Rahm)

5 career LIV titles. Heading to Augusta.

Meanwhile, Rahm leads ALL male pros in strokes gained.

3 runner-ups in 5 events. Best player not winning? 🤔

#GolfFanrecap #LIVGolf

stories.title: Rory McIlroy Goes Dark Before Masters — Defending Champion Sits Out All Pre-Augusta Events

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Rory won't play before the Masters.

Back injury. Barely made Players cut. T-46.

New Amazon doc: "came to resent the majors."

Defending champion. Skipping everything. 2 weeks out.

Bold or reckless? ⛳

#GolfFanrecap #RoryMcIlroy #Masters2026

stories.title: Lydia Ko Fires Career-Best 60 at LPGA Ford Championship

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Lydia Ko opened the LPGA Ford Championship with a 60. 🔥

12-under. Career best. 4 straight birdies to start.

Two-time Olympic gold medalist. Former world No. 1.

And she's still doing this. 👏

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA #LydiaKo

stories.title: Golf Ball Rollback Now In Effect for Elite Events — 15 Yards Shorter

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Golf ball rollback is here for elite competitions. ⚡

New cap: 317 yards (2026 Model Local Rule).

~15 yards shorter for the biggest hitters.

Recreational golf? Unaffected.

PGA Tour hasn't committed to adopting it. 👀

#GolfFanrecap #Golf #Rollback
